caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SMUT" sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. A professional black microphone is positioned in front of him. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and several clothing items hang on racks. On-screen logos include a circular emblem on the left and red text reading "SMELLY TOT" on the right. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expression shifting from a neutral, talking state to a smile and slight laugh as he looks slightly downward. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-camera, while the surrounding environment remains still.
